Visitor Pre-Registration
Pre-registered visitors receive: guaranteed Lucky Draw code · voting strips for Creator Challenge · Stamp Rally card
Visitor Registration Form
Demo form — not connected to a live database
Optional — for confirmation
✓ Confirmed! Your QR entry pass and Lucky Draw code will be sent via SMS before the event.
Pre-Registration Benefits
🎟
QR Entry PassSkip the queue — scan at registration for instant entry
🎰
1 Guaranteed Lucky Draw CodeWalk-in visitors have no guaranteed code — earn only through purchases
🕻
Creator Challenge Voting Strips3 tear-off strips (one per category) to vote for your favourite creator
🏷
Stamp Rally CardSpend across booths to earn additional Lucky Draw codes
Registration window: Open from 13 November 2026 until 10 February 2027
Event is free entry for all visitors — registered or walk-in

How the Entry Pass Works
1Register online before 10 February → receive QR code via SMS
2Scan QR at registration counter on event day → receive physical Entry Pass
3Watch creator speeches (10:50 AM) · Vote at Creator Hub from 1:00 PM
4Shop at 40 booths · collect Stamp Rally extra codes
5Stay for Grand Lucky Draw after closing speeches (5:35 PM)
Walk-in Visitors
Walk-in visitors are welcome — entry is always free. However they do not receive a guaranteed Lucky Draw code or voting strips.
Incentive to pre-register: 1 guaranteed code + 3 voting strips + Stamp Rally card. Walk-ins start from zero.
MTC Creator Challenge — Registration
Open to Myanmar nationals and residents aged 18–35 · TikTok · Instagram Reels · YouTube Shorts
Competitor Registration Form
Demo form · Entry code issued after verification
Prevents duplicate registrations
✓ Registration received! Your Entry Code (e.g. MTC-047) will be sent via SMS within 48 hours. Include it in your caption with #MTC2027.
How to Enter — 3 Steps
1
Register
Complete this form. Receive unique Entry Code (MTC-047) via SMS.
2
Create & Post
Shoot 60 sec to 3 min video. Post publicly with #MTC2027 + your Entry Code
3
Submit URL
Submit your video URL via the submission form. Deadline: 13 January 2027 at 11:59 PM.
Competition Timeline
13 Nov 2026Registration + competition opens
13 Jan 2027Submissions close (11:59 PM)
14–24 JanPanel review — top 27 selected
17 Jan 2027Entries reposted · Public voting opens
7 Feb 2027Public voting closes
13 Feb 2027Top 9 announced · Awards Ceremony

Event Day Schedule
13 February 2027 · Novotel Grand Ballroom, Yangon · Doors open 08:30 AM
09:00–09:10
Welcome & Introduction
09:10–09:30
Opening Ceremony & Speech — Ministry Representative
09:30–09:50
Tourism Fair Opens to Public
09:50–10:35
Panel Discussion — Myanmar Tourism: Where Next?
10:35–10:50
Tourism Quiz — 5 Questions, Spot Prizes
10:50–11:55
MTC Creator Challenge — 27 Competitor Speeches
12:00–13:00
Lunch Break + Live Cooking Demo at Food Corner
13:00
Voting Opens — ballot boxes at Creator Hub
13:00–14:00
Visitor Engagement Games + Lucky Draw Round 1
14:00–15:00
Workshop — How to Shoot a Travel Reel on Your Phone
15:00–15:40
Live On-Stage Vote Counting (3 categories)
15:40–16:05
Top 9 Finalists Announced + Group Photo
16:05–17:15
Creator Challenge Finals + Awards Ceremony
17:15–17:35
Thank You & Closing Speeches
17:35–18:00
Grand Lucky Draw + Event Close
